The '''''Proficient''-class light cruiser''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] warship.

==Characteristics==
The cruiser measured 850 meters in length and ran on a [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian]] power plant. Weapon systems included ten heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and twenty [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], a light armament for the cruiser's size. Much of the ship's interior was occupied by modular compartments, but most vessels sacrificed those for docking bay facilities.<ref name="AoC1" />

==History==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], however, the starship-strapped [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] reactivated a number of ''Proficient''-class cruisers, like ''[[Soothfast]]''.<ref name="AoC1" />
